Bus Timings

113 Bus Schedule Sharjah to Rashidiya Route

April 4, 2026
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Let’s chat about the 113 bus the MVP of Dubai-Sharjah routes. This bad boy is always packed, and for good reason. It’s the lifeline connecting Al Rolla Terminal in Sharjah to Rashidiya Metro Station in Dubai, hitting all the key spots along the way.

Seriously, this intercity beast is the glue holding the public transport system together between these two cities. Comfy ride, essential stops it’s a commuter’s dream. No wonder it’s the go-to for so many people making the daily Dubai-Sharjah hustle!

Contents

113 Bus Timings

The 113 bus operates daily from Sunday to Saturday. The first bus depart from Al Rolla Terminal at 05.45 am and the last bus departs at 11.20 pm. The buses run at intervals of approximately 30 minutes, ensuring regular and timely service throughout the day. And here is the complete of 113 bus timings that depart from Al Rolla Terminal:

From Sharjah From Rashidiya
05:45 06:50
06:15 07:20
06:45 07:50
07:15 08:20
07:45 08:50
08:15 09:20
08:45 09:50
09:15 10:20
09:45 10:50
10:15 11:20
10:45 11:50
11:15 12:20
11:45 12:50
12:15 13:20
12:45 13:50
13:15 14:20
13:38 14:50
14:01 15:13
14:24 15:36
14:47 15:59
15:10 16:22
15:33 16:45
15:56 17:08
16:19 17:31
16:42 17:54
17:05 18:17
17:28 18:40
17:51 19:03
18:14 19:26
18:37 19:49
19:00 20:12
19:23 20:35
19:46 20:58
20:09 21:21
20:32 21:44
21:00 22:07
21:35 22:35
22:10 23:05
22:45 23:40
23:20

113 Bus Route

Many of people in Sharjah visit to Rashidiya because this place is very strategic place.

It situated near Dubai International Airport and is easily accessible from the E311 Sheikh Mohammed Bin Zayed Road, making it a convenient starting point for travelers.

The stationâ€™s strategic location near major roadways and residential areas facilitates easy commuting for a large number of passengers daily.

And the route of 113 bus has several stops, here are some of them.

1.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Al Jubail Terminal: Located near the Al Jubail Fish Market, this stop serves as a major transit hub in Sharjah.

  2. King Faisal Street: A busy street near Al Qasba and Al Majaz Waterfront, offering scenic views and recreational activities.

  3. Malihan Road: Close to Sharjah Desert Park, a great spot for nature lovers.

  4. Sheikh Mohammed Bin Zayed Square: Near Dubai Silicon Oasis, a tech hub with many offices and residential areas.

  5. Al Qusais Bus Station: Close to Al Nahda Pond Park, a popular leisure spot.

7.

  1. Rashidiya Metro Station: The final stop, conveniently connected to the Dubai Metro’s Red Line, facilitating easy travel within Dubai.

Read Also: 117 Bus Timings Sharjah to Abu Dhabi

Fare

The fare for a journey from Al Rolla Terminal to Rashidiya Metro Station is 15 AED. If you’re traveling from Rashidiya to Sharjah, the fare is 10 AED. The journey is around 30 km that take around 1 hour trip.

Journey Experience

The 113 bus from Sharjah to Rashidiya offers a long yet enjoyable ride that showcases the UAE’s rich culture and urban development. Departing from Sharjah, passengers can admire the bustling Al Qasba canal, known for its art and entertainment options, as well as historic sites like the Sharjah Museum of Islamic Civilization, reflecting the city’s dedication to preserving its heritage.

As the bus crosses into Dubai, travelers catch glimpses of vibrant neighborhoods like Al Nahda and Al Mamzar, which feature a mix of local markets and modern shopping centers. The journey concludes in Rashidiya, near Dubai International Airport, making it a key area for travelers and expatriates. While the ride may be lengthy, the diverse landscapes and attractions along the way make it a fascinating trip for anyone exploring the UAE.

Conclusion

Whether you’re heading to work, exploring new places, or visiting friends, this bus route ensures you reach your destination comfortably and efficiently. And knowing the 113 bus timings and route will also help you to arrange your schedule.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: April 4, 2026.
